name: Bucket of Grilled Crawfish (Gr)
recipeIngredient: 15 red bliss potatoes, cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Build a fire and cover it with sandstone rocks.
2. Cover the rocks with seaweed.
3. Place chicken wire over the seaweed.
4. Add crawfish and potatoes on top of the chicken wire.
5. Cover with corn and lemon halves.
6. Sprinkle more seaweed on top.
7. If the seaweed dries out during cooking, pour ocean water on it.
Note: This recipe was busted by Gail Shermeyer on July 12, 1997.
